title: Verify personal-scale performance and limits
preconditions: Release-mode fixtures contain 100000 active transactions, 1000 category positions, 1000 retained snapshots, all active policies, and one-over-limit variants on the supported host.
steps: Measure repeated cold and warm Generate, Retain, Restate, Get, List, Status, Delete, and private validation runs; record p95 wall time, memory, phase timing, output size, and correctness.
expected: Every NFR-INSIGHTS-PERSONAL-SCALE-PERFORMANCE threshold holds; one-over-limit input fails before financial output or retained-state change.
